Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}"Superhero Crossover Collection"... H-Huh, so that's what they're showing today.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 21 8 7}{f 4 22 0 8 32 25 20}The monster on that poster is from Amoebaman...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}I-It's not like I'm super excited about it or anything![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 21 8 11}I was just bored, and I thought it would pass the time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_900_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Wings of the night, Feather Black... Transform![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_901_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Eat your heart out! Kotodamanger, bringing the soul![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_902_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Descendant of heroes... Senzoi Rider Z, at your service![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_903_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}So that comes out to... 48 heroes!? How many more are there!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...I feel like I've seen the heroes[n]transform hundreds of times.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It makes me feel as if[n]I can transform myself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Ah! Did you SEE the part where Amoebaman gets captured!?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}And THEN the part where he was in the underground prison, but used Morse code to call for help![n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 4 22 0 8 25 20 1}And how they had him tied up, but he managed to shoot out a laser beam JUST in the nick of time, and then the bad guys—[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Anyways... some of the scenes were pretty good.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}B-But it's all just make-believe anyways.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}That was a lot of fun. Thank you for inviting me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I went back to the dorm with Amada.[n]{f 1 1}
